<!--
Keep the PR small and reviewable. One RFC or ADR per PR is ideal.
-->

## Context

<!--
What is this PR about? Link to the tracker issue (e.g. ENG-123) and
summarise the problem in 2–3 sentences. Don't just paste the ticket —
explain why the reader should care.
-->

## Decision

<!--
What are you proposing / recording? If this PR adds an ADR, state the
decision in one sentence. If it adds an RFC, state the chosen option.
If it updates a C4 model, describe the shape of the change.
-->

## Evidence

<!--
How do we know this is right? Include any of:
- Rendered diagrams (PNGs committed in the PR)
- Links to prototypes / POCs
- Benchmarks, traces, or measurements
- Links to related ADRs / RFCs
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Filename follows the convention for this folder (see the folder's README).
- [ ] Frontmatter is valid (for ADRs).
- [ ] Rendered diagrams are committed alongside the DSL (for C4 / RFC impact).
- [ ] Linked the tracker issue.
